text: In competitive dynamics, market reports in late January 2026 indicated that NVIDIA and Apple were considering using Intel's foundry services for future chip production, which drove Intel shares up 10.2% in afternoon trading [915307c0-c1d2-4232-a603-3de1f933fa52, d221dbaa-f872-4882-943c-5d5c765f3698]. While these reports remain unconfirmed, they suggest potential supply chain diversification strategies. Meanwhile, NVIDIA's AI infrastructure ecosystem partners, including Arista Networks and CoreWeave, have experienced notable rallies as investors rotate back into AI infrastructure plays [bd2be37c-114a-47ed-9c6a-8570ade66726]. Industry commentary continues to position NVIDIA as a top play in the booming AI infrastructure market, with the company boasting a 53% net income ratio that attracts investors favoring strong profitability [8ea6204c-b60c-43ed-b244-62338e311dd0, 163132e4-10ea-41bc-9202-e5eb0356c9f3].
